title: Which model is Cursor IDE using when I specify a random model name?
author: Franck Dernoncourt
text:
Which model is Cursor IDE using when I specify a random model name?
Example: I specify a random model name some random name
:
Then I call it:
Which model is Cursor IDE using when I specify a random model name?
I wonder which model Cursor IDE is using.
